outcome_evidence.quote: I have created an urgent task for our team
contact you as soon as possible

outcome_rationale: A ticket was created with no timeframe beyond 'as soon as possible' and no reference number. The same promise was already broken once earlier the same day, per the caller.

escalation_evidence.quote: I would like to talk to the doctor
I will include this request and your concerns in the urgent message

escalation_rationale: The caller explicitly asked to speak to the doctor. The agent answered the request by documenting it inside another ticket rather than transferring.
